item.title: FallSim
item.description:
Summary

Similar to VSense, FallSim is a project that aims to overcome the small size limitation of real-world fall detection datasets with synthetically generated data. However, there are many difficult challenges, so we are still working on it.

My Role

I am working on this project as a co-author.

item.title: ODLIA
item.description:
Summary

ODLIA is an optimization - deep learning integrated acceleration system aiming to achieve highly fast (<10ms) XR scene understanding. Among the various scene-understanding techniques, we are focusing on Hand-Object Tracking.

My Role

As the team lead, I am responsible for all aspects.
